name: @w3kits/plugin-gpt-image-canvas
description: GPT Image Canvas plugin adapted from mrslimslim/gpt-image-canvas.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @gpt-image-canvas/shared build && pnpm --filter @gpt-image-canvas/web build && pnpm exec tsc -p runtime/daemon/tsconfig.webcontainer.json && node scripts/prepare-dist.mjs && node scripts/verify-w3kits-webcontainer-package.mjs
scripts.build:full: pnpm --filter @gpt-image-canvas/shared build && pnpm --filter @gpt-image-canvas/web build && pnpm --filter @gpt-image-canvas/api build
scripts.typecheck:full: pnpm --filter @gpt-image-canvas/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @gpt-image-canvas/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @gpt-image-canvas/api typecheck

author: W3Kits
